title: pilosella galiciensis
intro: Pilosella galiciensis, also known as Galician mouse-ear or Galician false dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella galiciensis has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella galiciensis can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
